name: protovoice
description: Dev-tooling shim for protoVoice (Python project). Provides npm script hooks used by CI verification.

scripts.typecheck: python3 -m py_compile app.py voice/agent.py voice/llm.py voice/text_chat.py voice/stt.py voice/tts.py voice/chunker.py voice/react_agent.py skills/loader.py skills/models.py && echo 'Python syntax check passed'
